problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
